candidate_targets.label: pion pcac ratio correlator
candidate_targets.summary: User explicitly asked for the narrow pion PCAC ratio path grounded in the local PyQUDA example.

confirmed_interpretation.label: pion pcac ratio correlator
confirmed_interpretation.summary: User explicitly asked for the narrow pion PCAC ratio path grounded in the local PyQUDA example.

external_lookup.reason: External lookup is disabled by default. Re-run with --enable-external-lookup to allow live online lookup.

formula_proposals.convention: Follow the narrow local PyQUDA PCAC example: start from a gauge configuration, build wall-source propagators, contract zero-momentum pion and pionA4 channels, then form C_A4P / C_PP.
formula_proposals.correlator: C_{PP}(t)=\sum_{\vec x}\langle O_\pi(\vec x,t) O_\pi^\dagger(\vec 0,0)\rangle,\ C_{A_4P}(t)=\sum_{\vec x}\langle A_4(\vec x,t) O_\pi^\dagger(\vec 0,0)\rangle
formula_proposals.label: Pion PCAC ratio from pseudoscalar and temporal-axial correlators
formula_proposals.operator: O_\pi(x) = \bar d(x)\gamma_5 u(x),\ A_4(x) = \bar d(x)\gamma_4\gamma_5 u(x)

inferred_interpretation.label: pion pcac ratio correlator
inferred_interpretation.summary: User explicitly asked for the narrow pion PCAC ratio path grounded in the local PyQUDA example.

live_online_lookup.note: Live online lookup is opt-in and only used when local PyQUDA evidence is insufficient for the physics-side target definition.

local_curated_citations.note: Curated local JSON citations are available and may be attached to the physics artifact or implementation plan.

model_inference.note: Model inference may be used for normalization or formula/operator explanation when an LLM backend is configured.

true_online_lookup.note: Legacy boundary label retained for compatibility. The active opt-in capability is recorded under knowledge_boundary.live_online_lookup.

llm_assistance.codex_preflight_reason: Codex backend failed during local app-client initialization in the current environment.
llm_assistance.fallback_reason: Explicit codex backend failed preflight (Codex backend failed during local app-client initialization in the current environment.), so the run will use the rule-based path.
llm_assistance.selection_reason: Explicit codex backend failed short preflight and fell back to rules.

normalized_request: please compute pion pcac ratio from existing propagator
